title: Create Chemistry and Minerals
body:
A mod that adds various chemistry mixes to the create mod including some references to certain series. Also adds music discs created by myself being mostly remixes/covers of the original songs of the series.

Some of the mixes are chemical elements or carbone chemistry derivateds such as nitrogen, methylamine, Phenylacetic acid, etc...

Everything that can be done is purely for fun and there is the posibility to trade with villagers new items!
